calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-06-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Donald Drummond, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Lily Dang appears in pro per with interpreter Yong Mei Liu. Respondents, Kan Cheung & Ying Fei Zheng appear in pro per with interpreter Norah Uyeda. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Drummond.
This case is heard with related case 833737.

9:59am
Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Judgment Entered
